ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the simulation in JSON format */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the simulation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this simulation belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the simulation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this step belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time elapsed since the start of the simulation */,
  "step_size" REAL /* Size of the time step */,
  "TRes" REAL /* Temperature resolution */,
  "heatCapacitor_T" REAL /* Temperature of the heat capacitor */,
  "switch_Controll" INTEGER /* Control signal for the switch */,
  "control_input" TEXT /* Additional control inputs */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions */,
  "sensor_data" TEXT /* Sensor data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the step was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_steps_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this result belongs to */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Raw data of the simulation result in JSON format */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the simulation result */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this result belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, error) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, run) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)
